text.autoconfig.flat_xp_gain.title: Flat XP Gain Settings
text.autoconfig.flat_xp_gain.option.modE: Enable or disable the entire mod.
text.autoconfig.flat_xp_gain.option.flat: Make every level cost the same amount (Level 1 Cost).
text.autoconfig.flat_xp_gain.option.line: Make XP costs scale linearly (Level 1 Cost + (Level - 1) * Next XP Addition).
